title: Water softening intercalation materials
abstract: An electrode for use in a device configured to remove ions from a solution. The electrode includes an intercalation material including a binary transition metal Prussian blue analogue compound, a ternary transition metal Prussian blue analogue compound, or a combination thereof. The binary compound may have a general formula: AxByCz[Fe(CN)6], where A=Li, Na, or K; B=Mn, Fe, Ni, Cu, or Zn; C=Mn, Fe, Ni, Cu, or Zn; 0ﾃ｢ﾂ可､xﾃ｢ﾂ可､1; 0ﾃ｢ﾂ可､yﾃ｢ﾂ可､1; and 0ﾃ｢ﾂ可､zﾃ｢ﾂ可､1. The ternary compound may have the general formula: AxByCzDw[Fe(CN)6], where A=Li, Na, or K; B=Mn, Fe, Ni, Cu, or Zn; C=Mn, Fe, Ni, Cu, or Zn; D=Mn, Fe, Ni, Cu, or Zn; 0ﾃ｢ﾂ可､xﾃ｢ﾂ可､1; 0ﾃ｢ﾂ可､yﾃ｢ﾂ可､1; 0ﾃ｢ﾂ可､zﾃ｢ﾂ可､1; 0ﾃ｢ﾂ可､wﾃ｢ﾂ可､1.
claims: 1. An electrode for use in a device configured to remove ions from a solution, the electrode comprising: an intercalation material including a ternary transition metal Prussian blue analogue compound having the general formula: A x B y C z D w [Fe(CN) 6 ], where A=Li, Na, or K; B=Mn, Fe, Ni, Cu, or Zn; C=Mn, Fe, Ni, Cu, or Zn; D=Mn, Fe, Ni, Cu, or Zn; 0竕､x竕､1; 0竕､y竕､1; 0竕､z竕､1; 0竕､w竕､1; x, y, z, and w are non-zero; and B, C, and D are different.
